Congratulations! \n\nYou’ve successfully:
Congratulations! 

You’ve successfully completed all courses in the SDL program. As a reward for your dedication, a digital certificate has been issued to recognize your achievement. You can access and download it via the email linked to your account.

This certificate highlights your life-saving skills and proves your commitment and expertise.Feel free to share your accomplishment and apply your knowledge in real-life situations. 

Thank you for your hard work and excellence!

In 2-rescuer training, you will switch r: In 2-rescuer training, you will switch roles with a virtual partner. Cycles 1–2 focus on \n chest compressions, 3–4 on ventilation, and 5–6 return to chest compressions.

the Arrival Time(sec) must be set to a value between 1 and 60 seconds

In the tutorial, you will go through fou:
In the tutorial, you will go through four training sessions: practicing proper chest compression position, depth, recoil, and rate individually,
followed by a session using an AED trainer to become familiar with how to operate an AED.

Welcome to the SDL Onsite Course!\nThis:
Welcome to the SDL Onsite Course!
This program equips you with the skills to recognize and respond to cardiac emergencies involving adults, childs, and infants through comprehensive training and hands-on practice. 

Before staring, ensure you’ve reviewed the course outline and prepared to engage in each step, from instructional videos to practical sessions. 

Upon successful completion, you’ll receive a 2-year digital certificate to validate your achievement. 

Let’s get started and build your life-saving skills!
